title: Spanish Delight
description: Adds spanish dishes and ingredients to Farmer's Delight!
body:
# Spanish Delight

Spanish Delight is a mod that expands upon the cooking system from Farmer's Delight introducing spanish cuisine's traditional plates such as Spanish Tortilla, Gazpacho and more.

Find new ingredients spawned in the world and cook delicious new meals!

⚙️ Dependencies:

You will need Farmers Delight and Forge to run this mod, and optionally but highly recommended JEI !

🧾 More:

I'm planning to add more foods and also doing the Fabric version in the future. Also, if you want to see the mod done for another Minecraft version comment it!

📝 Credits:

Developed by DevJulen

Big thanks to vectorwing for creating Farmer's Delight https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farmers-delight

Big thanks to ArBeet for creating the assets! https://x.com/ArBeeeet
